title: Helsingin Sanomat Waste Survey 2018
description: This survey, conducted by the newspaper Helsingin Sanomat in 2018, charted Finnish views on waste. The survey was conducted as part of the 'Waste Society: Living with Material Overflows' project funded by the Academy of Finland. Topics in the survey included, for instance, living with waste, attitudes towards waste, and a future of 'zero waste'.
